use_cases: Display subscription tiers with pricing information for SaaS products
Enable users to select pricing plans with clear call-to-action buttons
Present tiered pricing comparison in a clean, scannable layout
Support different pricing periods (monthly/yearly) with visual hierarchy
Show feature lists alongside pricing to aid decision-making
ai_summary: A minimalist pricing card component designed for SaaS applications to display subscription tiers. Features clean typography hierarchy with pricing amounts, feature lists, and call-to-action buttons with multiple variant options. Built with Tailwind CSS for flat design aesthetic, supporting desktop and mobile layouts with flexible content structure for tier comparison.
